language_rules: No corporate/career language — academic pressure, social comparison, identity formation
Body anchors: jaw clenched over textbook, shoulders at ears in library, chest tight before class
Grounding: dorm room, library desk, dining hall tray, shared bathroom mirror
Never: 'the commute', 'the office', 'the quarterly review', 'the meeting'
Always: 'the lecture', 'the assignment', 'the group chat', 'the dining hall', 'the roommate'

Grounding: dorm room, library desk, dining hall tray, shared bathroom mirror
Never: 'the commute', 'the office', 'the quarterly review', 'the meeting'
Always: 'the lecture', 'the assignment', 'the group chat', 'the dining hall', 'the roommate'
